title: joniris pallasii
intro: Joniris pallasii, also known as Tanacetum pallasii, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Joniris pallasii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for wound care.
